name: Heap
description: Heap automatically captures every user interaction — clicks, form submissions, page views — without any manual event tracking setup. This retroactive data collection means you never miss an event, even if you didn't think to track it.
use_cases: You want to analyse user behaviour retroactively — answering questions about events that happened before you thought to track them
Your team lacks engineering bandwidth to manually tag every click and form interaction before analysis can begin
You need to combine session recordings with funnel data to pinpoint exactly where users drop off in a specific flow
Your product team wants to run cohort and retention analysis without setting up a complex event taxonomy from scratch
